name: New user signup leads to onboarding wizard
description: A new user creates an account with email and password, then is redirected to the onboarding wizard where they set up their academic semester.

planSteps.description: Enter a unique email address in the email field
Enter a password of at least 6 characters in the password field
Click the submit button to create the account
Verify the page shows the onboarding wizard with a heading containing 'Set up your semester' and step indicators for Institution, Department, Year and Term
